title: Stained Glass
subtitle: Lead-free stained glass style pieces made with real glass. Textured on the front, smooth and glossy on the back. Made one by one in our small shop in Northern California.

categories.name: Sun Catchers
categories.description: Stained glass style window hangings made with real glass. Available in 6", 10", 12", and 15" sizes. Lead-free, made of one piece of glass with texture, transparent stains, and opaque pigments. Includes decorative chain for hanging.

images.alt: Blooming lotus stained glass sun catcher
Snowy owl stained glass sun catcher

categories.name: Ornaments
categories.description: Stained glass style Christmas ornaments made with real glass. Lead-free, with texture, transparent stains, and opaque pigments applied to one piece of glass. Textured on the front, smooth and glossy on the back.

categories.name: Custom From Photo
categories.description: Custom photo suncatchers made with real glass. Send us your photo and we create a stained glass style wall or window hanging from it. Available in multiple sizes.

images.alt: Custom family photo to stained glass suncatcher
Custom pet photo to stained glass suncatcher
Custom wedding photo to stained glass suncatcher

featuredWork.heading: Featured Glass Work
featuredWork.description: Each piece is made with real glass, lead-free, with texture and transparent stains applied by hand. Made one by one in our small shop in Northern California.
